name: Currency Exchange Rate API
description: Free Currency Exchange API - 30+ Currencies, ECB Rates, Historical Data

endpoints.name: Get Latest Rates
endpoints.description: Get latest exchange rates for a base currency. Returns all 30+ supported currencies.

endpoints.name: Convert Currency
endpoints.description: Convert an amount from one currency to another using real-time rates.

endpoints.name: List Currencies
endpoints.description: List all supported currencies with their full names.

endpoints.name: Historical Rates
endpoints.description: Get exchange rates for a specific historical date (back to 1999).

longDescription:
## Overview

Real-time and historical currency exchange rates from the European Central Bank (ECB). Supports 30+ currencies with conversion, latest rates, and historical data back to 1999. Fast responses with 1-hour caching. No external API key needed.

## Key Features

- ✅ 30+ currencies including USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, CNY, BRL
- ✅ Real-time rates updated daily by the ECB
- ✅ Historical exchange rates back to January 1999
- ✅ Direct currency conversion with precise calculations
- ✅ List all supported currencies with full names

## Use Cases

- **E-commerce**: Display prices in local currencies for international shoppers
- **Financial Dashboards**: Show real-time FX rates and historical trends
- **Travel Apps**: Currency conversion tools for travelers
- **Accounting Software**: Multi-currency invoice and expense tracking
- **Portfolio Management**: Track international investment values

## Quick Start

```
GET /convert?from=USD&to=EUR&amount=100
```

Returns the converted amount, exchange rate, and timestamp.

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Requests/mo | Rate Limit |
|------|-------|-------------|------------|
| **Basic (FREE)** | $0 | 500 | 1/sec |
| Pro | $5.99 | 10,000 | 10/sec |
| Ultra | $14.99 | 100,000 | 50/sec |

Free tier includes all endpoints. No credit card required.
long_description:
## Why Currency Exchange API?
- ✅ Official ECB (European Central Bank) data — reliable and authoritative
- ✅ Historical rates back to 1999 for trend analysis
- ✅ 30+ currencies with 1-hour cache for real-time accuracy

## Key Features
- 30+ currencies from ECB official feed
- Real-time exchange rates with 1-hour caching
- Currency conversion with amount calculation
- Historical rates back to 1999
- Latest rates endpoint for dashboards

## Use Cases
- **E-commerce**: Display prices in local currencies
- **Finance Apps**: Real-time currency conversion widgets
- **Accounting**: Historical rate lookups for bookkeeping
- **Travel Apps**: Multi-currency converters

## Quick Start
```
GET /convert?from=USD&to=EUR&amount=100
```

## Pricing
| Plan | Price | Requests/mo | Rate Limit |
|------|-------|-------------|------------|
| **Basic (FREE)** | $0 | 500 | 1/sec |
| Pro | $9.99 | 50,000 | 10/sec |
| Ultra | $29.99 | 500,000 | 50/sec |

Free tier includes all conversion features. No credit card required.

## Alternative To
A free **exchange rate API alternative** to Fixer.io, ExchangeRate-API, and Open Exchange Rates. ECB-sourced data updated daily.

## Need More Requests?
Free plan (500 conversions/month) for personal finance apps. **Pro ($5.99/mo)** for e-commerce and fintech with 50,000 requests.
